title: A Story from Chikamatsu
writer: Kyuichi Tsuji, Monzaemon Chikamatsu, Matsutarô Kawaguchi
actors: Kazuo Hasegawa, Kyôko Kagawa, Yôko Minamida
plot: Ishun is a wealthy but unsympathetic master printer who has wrongly accused his wife and best employee of being lovers. To escape punishment, the accused run away together, but Ishun is certain to be ruined if word gets out.
